description: SPX6900 (SPX) emerged in 2023 on Ethereum as a stock-market-satire memecoin parodying the S&P 500 through exaggerated market humor and explosive community momentum. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 SPX gives original SPX holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: SPX6900
